{{CargoOrgan
|name=Savant Eye
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10862
|idx=69
|description=An eye of savant coalesced after the fall of the high sequence. Can be used to ascend.
|skill=
|hp=3116
|def=190
|atk=192
|rush=152
|gene1=Gene Research Free Speedup +15m
|gene2=All Gene Research SPD +3%
|gene3=Wind DMG +90
|gene4=Each round, {race} RUSH +60
|gene5=Gaia Rocket Cabin, deployable robots +3
|gene7=Gaia Rocket Cabin, deployable robots +9 (Awakened)
|}}
